scripts.sync-deploy: powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path 'c:/Antigravity/BriskSchedules/js/app.js' -Destination 'c:/Antigravity/mcjp-io/public/schedule/js/app.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'c:/Antigravity/BriskSchedules/css/styles.css' -Destination 'c:/Antigravity/mcjp-io/public/schedule/css/styles.css' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'c:/Antigravity/BriskSchedules/index.html' -Destination 'c:/Antigravity/mcjp-io/public/schedule/index.html' -Force" && git add -A && git commit -m "sync: BriskSchedules → mcjp-io [auto]" && git push origin main
